e107Plugin.name: TrashWords
e107Plugin.summary: ADMIN - Just Click & Drag Bad words to the Trash (Profanity Filter)!
e107Plugin.description: TrashWords allows ADMIN to simply double-click BAD words, drag them to the textbox and save them to the Profanities filter. The Profanities filter must be enabled in Admin~Settings~Preferences~Content Filters. If a word was added by mistake, that is also where ADMIN can go to remove them from the filter.
e107Plugin.copyright: Copyright Billy Smith, Vitalogix™, Licensed under GNU GPL
